query:
SELECT 
  m.id,
  m.clientId,
  c.name as clientName,
  m.mealType,
  m.createdAt,
  m.aiDescription,
  m.calories,
  m.protein,
  m.carbs,
  m.fat,
  m.fibre,
  m.source
FROM meals m
LEFT JOIN clients c ON m.clientId = c.id
WHERE m.aiDescription LIKE '%vitamin%'
   OR m.aiDescription LIKE '%supplement%'
   OR m.aiDescription LIKE '%capsule%'
   OR m.aiDescription LIKE '%tablet%'
ORDER BY m.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 50;

  m.aiDescription,
  m.calories,
  m.protein,
  m.carbs,
  m.fat,
  m.fibre,
  m.source
FROM meals m
LEFT JOIN clients c ON m.clientId = c.id
WHERE m.aiDescription LIKE '%vitamin%'
   OR m.aiDescription LIKE '%supplement%'
   OR m.aiDescription LIKE '%capsule%'
   OR m.aiDescription LIKE '%tablet%'
ORDER BY m.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
